trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Fall asleep while I build a zoo (Part 2)
trending_videos.description:
Fall asleep while I play PLANET ZOO (PART 2) - Back for more, building a zoo with calm commentary and chill life chats and advice! Episode 49 of my gaming ASMR series to help you sleep, relaxing gameplay & chill commentary with MadMorph, perfect for study, background noise, relaxation, and sleep. 

Check out the podcast below, on Spotify and everywhere you get podcasts. 

►  My PODCAST for sleep: https://downtosleeppodcast.com

【STAFF】

videos_without_transcripts.title: Grand Theft Auto VI: Official Cover Art Reveal
videos_without_transcripts.description:
Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers.

Check out the official cover art, also available as downloadable artwork at rockstargames.com/VI

keyObservations.details: Spider-Man related videos appear three times, indicating high interest in superhero content.
Grand Theft Auto VI cover art reveal suggests strong anticipation and engagement with major gaming franchises.
Chainsaw Man content reflects ongoing popularity of anime, especially for upcoming arcs.
Topoppgen's music video highlights the cross-cultural appeal of music content.
Outer Banks teaser points to continued interest in streaming platform content, particularly series with strong fanbases.

channelInsights.engagementStrategy: Leverages well-known franchises to attract large audiences.
Uses engaging video titles and unique content angles like 'I Got Hunted By a Minecraft Combat Master.'
Capitalizes on popular anime series with upcoming arcs.
Releases highly anticipated content related to major gaming franchises.
Utilizes music to engage audiences across cultural boundaries.

insights.actionableInsight: Develop content around upcoming superhero movies or series, focusing on fan theories and easter eggs.
Create anticipation for upcoming game releases with teasers and gameplay breakdowns.
Explore content around upcoming anime arcs to capture engaged anime fanbases.
Capitalize on the release of new streaming series seasons with analysis and recap content.
Leverage the global appeal of music to reach diverse audiences, incorporating different genres and styles.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
